Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Black dragons]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — The aura around Ekeri's wound was black and red, indicating black dragons.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The black dragon is part of Sophara's team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The black dragon has a long, snake-like body, two huge wings, and massive claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The black dragon's eyes are like Orthos'—solid darkness with two fiery rings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The black dragon breathes a bar of darkness with red sparks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The black dragon radiates the power of destruction.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — A black dragon's Herald Remnant has been frozen in time for hundreds of years in a castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Black dragons are the kings of the continent and are very proud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — A black dragon has red shimmering scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — A black dragon erupted from the basement of Shatterspine Castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — There are black dragons in the castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Dream madra was taking over the black dragons in the castle.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
